# ManiGinaM, LLC — Gina Martiny

> Software engineer in Port Allen, Louisiana (West Baton Rouge Parish). Custom software development, AI integration, industrial automation, and web development for the greater Baton Rouge area.

## Pages
- [Home](https://maniginam.dev/): Portfolio, services, and overview for ManiGinaM, LLC
- [Blog](https://maniginam.dev/blog/): Posts on software craftsmanship, AI, TDD, and building in Louisiana
- [Resume](https://maniginam.dev/resume.html): Professional experience — software engineering, AI, industrial automation

## Services
- Custom software development
- AI integration and consulting
- Industrial automation / legacy system modernization
- Web application development

## Related projects
- [AI Leapers](https://aileapers.com): AI tools and buyer's-guide reviews
- [LegacyLeaps](https://legacyleaps.com)
- [WBR Local](https://wbr.maniginam.dev): West Baton Rouge community
- [Sideline Sports](https://sideline.maniginam.dev)
- [TradeUp](https://tradeup.maniginam.dev)

## Machine interfaces
- Agent card (A2A): https://maniginam.dev/.well-known/agent.json
- MCP discovery: https://maniginam.dev/.well-known/mcp.json
- OpenAPI: https://maniginam.dev/openapi.json
- Newsletter subscribe: POST https://maniginam.dev/api/subscribe {"email": "..."}
- Markdown of any page: send header `Accept: text/markdown`

## Contact

- Chamber: member, West Baton Rouge Chamber of Commerce
